body_excerpt:
Published: Jun 10, 2026
Version: 1.0
Revision: 1.0
Summary 1 of 5
A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input Validation vulnerability found in UID Enterprise Agent to execute a Command Injection on the host device.
Affected Products:
UID Enterprise Agent (Version 1.61.3 and earlier)
Mitigation:
Update your UID Enterprise Agent to Version 1.61.4 or later.
Impact:
CVSS v3.0 Severity and Metrics:
Base Score:
9.9 Critical
Vector:
CVSS
:
CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H
CVE
:
CVE-2026-47367
(Abdulaziz Almadhi | Catchify Security)
Summary 2 of 5
A malicious actor with access to the network could exploit a Path Traversal vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to obtain data from such UniFi OS devices or instances.
Affected Products:
UDM, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCK, UCKP, UCK-Enterprise, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, ENVR-Core, UNVR-G2, UNVR-G2-Pro, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber (Version 5.1.12 and earlier)
UniFi OS Server (Version 5.0.8 and earlier)
UDM-Beast (Version 5.1.11 and earlier)
UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8 (Version 5.1.10 and earlier)
Express (Version 4.0.14 and earlier)
Mitigation:
Update your UniFi OS Server, UDM, UDM-Beast, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCK, UCKP, UCK-Enterprise, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, ENVR-Core, UNVR-G2, UNVR-G2-Pro, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber to Version 5.1.15 or later.
Update your UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8 to Version 5.1.16 or later.
Update your Express to Version 4.0.15 or later.
Impact:
CVSS v3.0 Severity and Metrics:
Base Score:
8.6 High
Vector:
CVSS:
CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N
CVE:
CVE-2026-47368
(Brandon Rossi)
Note
: This CVE can be chained with other vulnerabilities to eliminate the requirement for low-privileged access.
Summary 3 of 5
A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input Validation vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to escalate privileges within such UniFi OS devices or instances.
Affected Products:
UDM, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCK, UCKP, UCK-Enterprise, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, ENVR-Core, UNVR-G2, UNVR-G2-Pro, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber (Version 5.1.12 and earlier)
UniFi OS Server (Version 5.0.8 and earlier)
UDM-Beast (Version 5.1.11 and earlier)
UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8 (Version 5.1.10 and earlier)
Express (Version 4.0.14 and earlier)
Mitigation:
Update your UniFi OS Server, UDM, UDM-Beast, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCK, UCKP, UCK-Enterprise, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, ENVR-Core, UNVR-G2, UNVR-G2-Pro, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber to Version 5.1.15 or later.
Update your UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8 to Version 5.1.16 or later.
Update your Express to Version 4.0.15 or later.
Impact:
CVSS v3.0 Severity and Metrics:
Base Score:
9.9 Critical
Vector:
CVSS:
CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H
CVE:
CVE-2026-47369
(Brandon Rossi)
Summary 4 of 5
A malicious actor with access to the network and low privileges could exploit an Improper Input Validation vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to execute a Command Injection within such UniFi OS devices or instances.
Affected Products:
UDM, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCK, UCKP, UCK-Enterprise, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, ENVR-Core, UNVR-G2, UNVR-G2-Pro, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber (Version 5.1.12 and earlier)
UniFi OS Server (Version 5.0.8 and earlier)
UDM-Beast (Version 5.1.11 and earlier)
UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8 (Version 5.1.10 and earlier)
Express (Version 4.0.14 and earlier)
Mitigation:
Update your UniFi OS Server, UDM, UDM-Beast, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCK, UCKP, UCK-Enterprise, UNVR, UNVR-Pro, UNVR-Instant, ENVR, ENVR-Core, UNVR-G2, UNVR-G2-Pro, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber to Version 5.1.15 or later.
Update your UNAS-2, UNAS-4, UNAS-Pro, UNAS-Pro-4 and UNAS-Pro-8 to Version 5.1.16 or later.
Update your Express to Version 4.0.15 or later.
Impact:
CVSS v3.0 Severity and Metrics:
Base Score:
9.9 Critical
Vector:
CVSS:
CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:H
CVE:
CVE-2026-47370
(Brandon Rossi)
Summary 5 of 5
Under certain network configurations, a malicious actor with access to network could exploit an Improper Access Control vulnerability found in certain devices running UniFi OS to make unauthorized changes to such UniFi OS devices.
Affected Products:
UDM, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber (Version 5.1.12 and earlier)
UDM-Beast (Version 5.1.11 and earlier)
Mitigation:
Update your UDM, UDM-Beast, UDM-Pro, UDM-SE, UDM-Pro-Max, EFG, UDW, UDR, UDR7, UDR-5G, Express 7, UCG-Ultra, UCG-Max, UCG-Industrial and UCG-Fiber to Version 5.1.15 or later.
Impact:
CVSS v3.0 Severity and Metrics:
Base Score:
8.1 High
Vector:
CVSS:
CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H
CVE:
CVE-2026-48610
(Duc Anh Nguyen (@heckintosh_))
